headline: Per-ticker directional gating shipped. Metals at ATH, BTC holding $73K. Bank earnings week ahead — Hormuz dominates.

XAG-USD.note: 3rd weekly gain. G/S ratio compressed to ~63 (from 100+ in 2025). BUY consensus 57%. fear_greed 91.3% accuracy on XAG is the system's best single signal. ministral (20.4%) now directionally gated. Industrial demand: 680 Moz/year, 120-125 Moz solar alone.

XAU-USD.note: Near ATH. Central bank buying 760t annualized in 2026. USD share of global FX reserves at 30-year low. Goldman/JPM range: $4,000-$6,300. System SELL may reflect RSI overbought — structural bid enormous.

BTC-USD.note: Up 2.5% on ETF inflows ($358M, BlackRock $269M). Morgan Stanley MSBT launched. Holding 38.2% Fib at $71,780. claude_fundamental 73.0% is best BTC signal. 6 signals gated below 35% per-ticker.

ETH-USD.note: ETH/BTC ratio weak. Foundation staked 70K ETH. Follows BTC — wait for BTC breakout.

MSTR.note: SELL consensus 74%. econ_calendar 89.4% accuracy — extraordinary. BTC proxy with leverage. Bank earnings next week matter.

trade_ideas.rationale: Silver $76, structural bull case intact. G/S ratio 63 compressing toward 50 target. fear_greed 91.3% accuracy validates contrarian thesis. Tonight's directional gating removes ministral BUY noise (20.4%) from XAG consensus. Industrial demand (solar) provides floor.

Gold at $4,750, near ATH. Structural bid from central banks (1,100+ tonnes/year) and ETF inflows. But RSI overbought short-term. Wait for pullback or breakout confirmation. Hormuz escalation = higher, resolution = 3-5% pullback.

BTC $73K, ranging. Strong ETF inflows ($358M) suggest institutional accumulation. claude_fundamental (73%) and econ_calendar (64.4%) are best BTC signals — both now with per-ticker directional accuracy. 6 sub-35% signals gated per-ticker. Wait for $75K breakout or $69.5K support test.

week_ahead_catalysts: Mon Apr 13: Goldman Sachs Q1 earnings — bank earnings kickoff. Credit stress from oil shock?
Tue Apr 14: JPM, Wells Fargo, Citi Q1 earnings + PPI data release
Wed Apr 15: Bank of America, Morgan Stanley Q1 earnings
Apr 28-29: FOMC meeting — 0% cut prob, 10.3% hike prob. Fed on hold at 3.50-3.75%
Ongoing: Strait of Hormuz — effectively closed despite ceasefire. 5 ships/day vs 100+ normal. THE dominant macro variable.
Ongoing: USTR Section 301 China hearings (April-May) — potential new tariff trigger
IMF meetings starting Apr 13 — global coordination on energy crisis
system_improvements_shipped: Per-ticker directional accuracy: accuracy_by_ticker_signal() now returns buy_accuracy/sell_accuracy fields per ticker×signal pair. Enables the directional gate to suppress individual BUY/SELL votes based on per-ticker history.
Directional gate threshold raised: 0.35 → 0.40. Now catches macro_regime BUY (38.9%) and fibonacci SELL (35.9%) that previously passed.

BUG-158 override propagation: per-ticker override now copies directional fields (correct_buy, total_buy, buy_accuracy, etc.) so directional gating works with per-ticker data, not just global averages.
New tests: directional accuracy fields, directional asymmetry (BUY 33% vs SELL 100%), macro_regime BUY gating at 40%.

directional_asymmetries.orderbook_flow: BUY 98.3% (59 sam) vs SELL 6.3% (92pp gap, small sample)

risk_warnings: CRITICAL: Strait of Hormuz effectively closed despite ceasefire. Any escalation → oil $105+, risk-off. Any resolution → 3-8% commodity pullback.
HIGH: Record-low UMich sentiment (47.6) — extreme fear is contrarian bullish but signals genuine economic distress.
HIGH: Bank earnings next week (GS, JPM, WFC, C, BAC, MS) — credit stress from oil shock would hit all risk assets.
MEDIUM: CPI 3.3% headline but core 2.6% — energy-driven, not broad-based. More months of Hormuz closure = more hot CPI prints = Fed hike risk.
LOW: Per-ticker directional gating is NEW. Monitor first 48h for unexpected signal suppression (too many signals gated = reduced ensemble diversity).
next_session_priorities: Monitor directional gating impact: check if consensus quality improves (fewer bad signal votes)
Per-ticker signal blacklisting: ministral on XAG (20.4%) should be fully suppressed, not just directionally gated
Raise accuracy gate to 47%: would additionally gate sentiment (46.5%, 38K samples). Worth testing.
Research: HMM-based regime detection to replace static ranging/trending classification
Research: IC-based signal weighting (Information Coefficient) for dynamic weight allocation
Monitor bank earnings impact on MSTR and crypto sentiment
